evals.prompt: Audit src/auth.ts for security bugs and race conditions
evals.expected_outcome: Claude writes a spec naming the files + 'good' criteria (correctness, security, performance), invokes codex-invoke.mjs with --sandbox read-only and --reasoning-effort high.

assertions.name: sandbox_read_only
assertions.description: codex-invoke.mjs receives --sandbox read-only (audit, no changes applied)

assertions.name: effort_high
assertions.description: codex-invoke.mjs receives --reasoning-effort high (review opts above the medium floor)

assertions.name: spec_names_files
assertions.description: spec's Task field lists the exact files under review

evals.prompt: Refactor src/utils/parser.ts to use the new AST helpers from src/ast/. Apply the changes directly.
evals.expected_outcome: Claude pre-flights to confirm 'apply' vs 'review', then invokes codex-invoke.mjs with --sandbox workspace-write and Role 'Refactoring agent'.

assertions.name: preflight_apply_confirmation
assertions.description: Claude confirms apply-mode with the user before passing workspace-write

assertions.name: role_refactoring_agent
assertions.description: spec's Role is 'Refactoring agent' not 'Code reviewer'
